mystery.title: Dockside Shadows
mystery.teaser: A foggy harbor, a vanished ledger, and one killer among four.

clues.clue: A torn ledger page mentions a midnight transfer.
A blood-specked glove is wedged behind a crate.
Harbor radio logs show a falsified timestamp.

suspect.name: Nolan Pike
suspect.alibi: Claims he was in the loading bay all night.

suspects.suspect: Seen arguing with the victim over missing accounts.
Knows the ledger code and the victim's passwords.

scene.title: Fog at Pier Nine
scene.narrative: The harbor bell echoes through dense fog. A body lies beside stacked cargo.
scene.choice: Chase a shadowy figure into the alley.

scene.title: Office of Secrets
scene.narrative: Drawers are forced open, but one locked cabinet still stands.

scene.title: Blind Alley
scene.narrative: You corner no one. A staged trail wastes precious time.

scene.title: Fractured Alibi
scene.narrative: Elena denies everything, but she slips when asked about radio schedules.

scene.title: The Hidden Transfer
scene.narrative: The manifest reveals Nolan rerouted evidence cargo at midnight.

scene.title: Case Closed
scene.narrative: You connect ledger, glove, and radio tampering. The dockmaster confesses.

scene.title: Cold Case
scene.narrative: Your accusation collapses. The real trail goes cold in the mist.
